title: Annaiyin Karuvil Lyrics Haridas Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Annaiyin Karuvil
Singer: Shankar Mahadevan
Music: Vijay Antony
Movie: Haridas		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Kastangalai thaangu vettri undu
medum pallam thaaney vazhkai ingu
kanavugal kaanu thookam kondru
nadandhidum endru nambi indru

idukkan varungaal naguga adhanai
aduththoorva adhoppa dhil.

vellath thanaiya malarneettam maandhartham
ullath thanaiyadhu uyarvu

Deivathal aagatheninum muyarchi
than meivarutha kooli tharum]]

Vidhaikkul thoongum aala maram
kannukku theriyadhu
Adhu maramaai valarum kaalavarum
adhu manukkul urangaadhu

Nee thaedum sigaram dhooramilai
nadapadhai niruthaadhey
Perum thuli thaan ingu kadalaagum
nambikkai thozhaikaadhey

Meendum meendum paadham pattaal
paarai kooda paadhai aagum
munnaal vaitha kaalai neeyum
pinnaal edukaadhey

Pookal pooka vergal thaevai
vettrikingae vervai thaevai
un kairegai theidhaalum
uzhaipadhai niruththaadhey

Annaiyin Karuvil kalayaamal pirandhaaye
appodhey manidhaa nee jeyithaaye (2)

Unnaal enna mudiyum endru
unnake theriyadhu
Un sakthiyayai neeyum purindhu
kondaal saadhika thadaiyedhu

Muyarchigal seidhu thorpadhellaam
thozhvigal kidayaadhu
Vilundhu vidaamal yaarum ingae
elundhadhu kidayaadhu

Illai endra sollai kooda
illai endru thookkip podu
naalai unnai melae yetrum
thunichalai illakaadhey

Vilndhaal kooda pandhaai maaru
vegam kondu melae aeru
Mundhik kondu munnaal odu
muyarchiyai niruthaadhey

Annaiyin Karuvil kalayaamal pirandhaaye
appodhey manidhaa nee jeyithaaye (2)

English Translation
I tried my best :)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Annaiyin Karuvil'?

The song conveys deep emotions of devotion and the bond between a mother and child, reflecting on life's challenges and victories.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Haridas'?

In Haridas, the song plays during a poignant moment that highlights the protagonist's struggles and his connection to his roots.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Annaiyin Karuvil'?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by Vijay Antony.

When was 'Annaiyin Karuvil' released?

The song was released on December 3, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Annaiyin Karuvil from the movie Haridas, Shankar Mahadevan's soulful rendition evokes a sense of nostalgia and devotion. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, reflect the struggles and triumphs of life, emphasizing the importance of maternal bonds. The soothing melody composed by Vijay Antony enhances the emotional depth of the song, making it a perfect fit for moments of reflection and celebration. Overall, this song beautifully captures the essence of love and resilience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Annaiyin Karuvil is a soul-stirring melody that beautifully captures the essence of devotion and nostalgia. With Shankar Mahadevan's mesmerizing vocals and Vijay Antony's enchanting music, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the heartfelt emotions woven into the lyrics by Na Muthukumar in the film Haridas.
stanzaMeanings: You were born without any obstacles, and from that moment, you have succeeded.
Life here is filled with challenges, but there is victory in overcoming them. Dreams are seen, and we walk with hope today.
When the obstacles come, laugh at them, and they will go away.
The pure white flower blooms, and the essence within it is high.
Even if fate is against you, hard work will bring its rewards.
In the world of creation, the tree that sleeps does not know. It grows silently, and the people do not rest.
Do not stop the path you walk, as you seek the heights. Here, great hope will become a reality.
If you keep walking, the path will open up. Do not stop, as tomorrow will bring new opportunities.
Flowers bloom, and the need for them is recognized. Even if you search with your hands, do not stop working.
You were born without any obstacles, and from that moment, you have succeeded.
You do not know what you can achieve. If you understand your strength, there is nothing you cannot accomplish.
Efforts made will not go in vain. No one here can fall without trying.
Even the word 'no' does not exist. Tomorrow, do not let any misfortune come upon you.
Even if you fall, rise quickly and move forward. Do not stop your efforts from the past.
You were born without any obstacles, and from that moment, you have succeeded.
